name: Abhijeet Santosh Joshi
title: MCA | AI & DS | Full Stack Developer
summary: AI & full-stack developer focused on building production-ready web apps and multimodal AI solutions. Experienced in React, Node, Laravel, MySQL, and building AI chatbots and vision/voice-enabled systems.

bullets: Developed an admin dashboard using React.js, Node.js, Laravel, and MySQL to enhance user-company engagement and assessments.
Planned AI integration for security assessments using deep learning models and Django.
Designed advanced chatbots with RAG, LLM, and LangChain; contributed modules using Python, PostgreSQL, and low-code platforms.

projects.name: MedMind AI: Virtual Doctor with Eyes and Ears
projects.description: Multimodal AI-powered medical chatbot named 'AI Doctor' integrating vision and voice capabilities. Analyzes medical images and text inputs to provide diagnostic insights and conversational support. Uses Groq/Gradio for multimodal, LLMs for reasoning, and a custom interface.

projects.name: Plant Disease Prediction
projects.description: CNN-based deep learning model to analyze and predict plant diseases from leaf photos with a trained model for accurate classification.

projects.name: Online Pizza Shopping
projects.description: Individual project: full-stack online pizza ordering system built with Java, JSP/Servlet, MySQL, HTML, CSS, and Bootstrap.

finalProjectTitle: MedMind AI: Virtual Doctor with Eyes and Ears
